response.justification: While Bogdan possesses extensive software development experience, strong communication skills, and some exposure to investment banking, his resume does not demonstrate the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development specifically on the Windows platform, nor strong experience with SQL Server or Oracle, which are core technical requirements for this role. The lack of these critical skills makes him unsuitable for the C++ Developer position.
strengths: Extensive and diverse software development experience (over 10 years).
Demonstrated strong communication and teaching abilities through workshops and talks.
Solid experience with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps infrastructure.
concerns: Limited explicit C++ development experience on the Windows platform (only 6 months mentioned).
Lack of demonstrated strong hands-on experience with SQL Server or Oracle.
No explicit experience in Fixed Income or Fixed Income Derivatives.
